title: Zutari George - Engineering excellence in the Western Cape
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Zutari is a multinational...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Zutari is a multinational infrastructure engineering and advisory firm with a legacy dating back to 1932 and a strong presence in George since 1971. For over five decades, our George office has been at the forefront of engineering innovation in the Western Cape, delivering sustainable infrastructure solutions that empower communities and support long term regional resilience.


> As part of Zutari’s 2 200-strong team across Africa and the Middle East, the George office contributes meaningfully to projects that blend digital transformation, environmental stewardship, and effective project management.


Our local presence enables us to create real, lasting impact, shaping infrastructure that meets today’s needs while preparing for tomorrow.


> A stand-out example of this impact is the award-winning Garden Route Dam project.


Raising of the Garden Route Dam spillway and embankment crest.


> Photos: www.zutari.com


Appointed by the George Municipality in 2018, Zutari introduced a pioneering “duckbill” spillway design to solve complex technical and environmental challenges. The result: a 25% increase in the dam’s storage capacity, along with improved safety and discharge performance. As the city's main source of drinking water, the enhanced dam plays a critical role in securing George’s future.

From George, we continue to deliver excellence, advancing infrastructure that makes a difference locally and beyond.


> Click here to vote: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
